channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump says Iran will be bombed 'at much higher level' if they don't agree to peace deal
item.description: Washington reportedly expects responses from Tehran on several key points within the next 48 hours.

item.title: Uber and Disney are seeing the same remarkable dynamic in this economy. Both stocks are surging
item.description: Uber and Disney pointed to a resilient spending backdrop, with consumers continuing to shell out for rides, food delivery, vacations and theme park trips.

item.title: Dow futures surge 400 points as oil dives on Iran deal progress, AMD jumps: Live updates
item.description: Buoyed by solid earnings and lower oil prices, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite both reached new intraday and closing highs on Tuesday.

item.title: Nvidia, Corning partner on massive optical fiber deal that may be a game changer for AI
item.description: Corning is opening three new advanced manufacturing plants in the U.S. dedicated entirely to optical technologies for Nvidia.

item.title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, AMD, Palantir, Monster Beverage, Alphabet, Meta, Sphere Entertainment & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

item.title: Private payrolls rose by 109,000 in April, topping expectations, ADP says
item.description: The report provided more evidence of a stable labor market and less incentive for the Fed to lower interest rates.

item.title: Disney pops 4% after streaming, parks drive revenue beat in first report under CEO Josh D'Amaro
item.description: Disney revenue topped analyst expectations when the media giant reported its fiscal second-quarter earnings on Wednesday.

item.title: AMD's stock soars 20% as data center growth pushes revenue and guidance past estimates
item.description: AMD's earnings report lands as investors rush into the stock on optimism that the AI boom is just getting started.

item.title: CVS blows past estimates, hikes outlook as insurance business outperforms
item.description: All of the health-care giant's business segments, including its insurer Aetna, its retail pharmacy and health services unit, surpassed expectations.

item.title: Uber jumps 5% as company issues higher-than-expected bookings guidance
item.description: Uber said its net income took a $1.5 billion hit in the first quarter of 2026 due to the revaluation of the company's equity investments.

item.title: Wearable patches: How Barrière is trying to disrupt the supplement industry
item.description: Supplement patch company Barrière is launching the first-ever lactose intolerance patch in 1,700 Walmart stores, the company told CNBC exclusively.

item.title: Apple's R&D investments top 10% of sales as AI race creates 'sense of urgency'
item.description: Apple’s R&D spending has crossed 10% of revenue for the first time in at least 30 years, and increased twice as fast as sales in the latest quarter.

item.title: Restaurant Brands International earnings top estimates, fueled by Burger King turnaround
item.description: Restaurant Brands International reported quarterly earnings and revenue that topped Wall Street's estimates.

item.title: 3 ways the pros are trading markets right now — including a mistake one says bond traders are making
item.description: CNBC shares three investment strategies from guests in our London and Singapore studios.

item.title: From jewelers to health tech, CEOs want tariff refunds as earnings take a hit
item.description: Philips and Pandora on Wednesday announced their intentions to apply for tariff rebates in the aftermath of President Trump's "liberation day" blitz.

item.title: Mortgage rates hit the highest level in a month, causing first-time homebuyers to drop out
item.description: Mortgage rates rose last week, causing loan demand to drop back and causing the average loan size to rise — indicating that lower-income borrowers dropped out.

item.title: Ken Griffin: We will create jobs in Miami as a consequence of NYC Mayor Mamdani's wealth tax video
item.description: Ken Griffin, CEO of Citadel, reacts to New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's push to tax the rich, including a video filmed outside of Griffin's Manhattan apartment.

item.title: FDA announces its first approval of fruit-flavored e-cigarettes for adults in major shift under Trump
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday announced its first authorization of fruit-flavored electronic cigarettes intended for adult smokers.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: AMD, Disney, Uber, Corning, Super Micro Computer & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

item.title: FDA withdrew studies finding Covid, shingles vaccines were safe
item.description: The studies were "withdrawn because the authors drew broad conclusions that were not supported by the underlying data," the spokesperson told CNBC.

item.title: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy breaks from 'never sell' approach to the flagship crypto
item.description: Strategy is shifting from passive bitcoin accumulation to actively managing balance sheet to boost bitcoin per share value.

item.title: 41% of credit card debt starts with a surprise expense — 3 ways to stay ahead
item.description: Unexpected expenses can be, well, expensive. Here's how to prepare to pay for them to avoid credit card debt.

item.title: Wegovy pill sales smash forecasts, sending Novo Nordisk stock 7% higher
item.description: Novo Nordisk raised its outlook for 2026 after a strong performance from its newly launched Wegovy pill.

item.title: China presses Iran against resuming war, urges Hormuz reopening ahead of Trump-Xi summit
item.description: China called for a "prompt resumption of shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz," though that point was absent in Iran's statement.

item.title: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation
item.description: Spirit Airlines was back in bankruptcy court to start dismantling the airline.

item.title: OpenAI trial: Brockman rebuts Musk's take on startup's history, recounts secret work for Tesla
item.description: OpenAI President Greg Brockman concluded his testimony on Tuesday as the blockbuster trial between the AI startup and Elon Musk rolled into its second week.

item.title: EV maker Lucid suspends production guidance amid incoming CEO's business review
item.description: Lucid Group said it will make moves to better align its production with customer demand for its luxury all-electric vehicles.

item.title: Aluminum prices are surging. Here's how companies are handling the costs
item.description: Aluminum's surge since the start of the Iran war is creating cost pressures for some of America's largest companies.

item.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.

item.title: Lufthansa faces nearly $2 billion in extra fuel cost amid the Iran war, after axing 20,000 flights
item.description: Germany's largest airline, Lufthansa, is taking on additional fuel costs as the Middle East conflict poses 'enormous challenges.'
